title: Two years ago the debate was whether institutions would even touch public blockchains. Now the debate is whether a tokenized fund can afford to launch withou...
message_html: Two years ago the debate was whether institutions would even touch public blockchains. Now the debate is whether a tokenized fund can afford to launch withou... ...
snippet: Centrifuge (@centrifuge): Two years ago the debate was whether institutions would even touch public blockchains. Now the debate is whether a tokenized fund can afford to launch without composability on the roadmap. A lot has changed.
